content: Remote OK Director Customer Success Pencil <strong>About us:<br><br></strong>At Pencil, we are driving innovation in advertising technology through our state-of-the-art SaaS product, which harnesses Generative AI to redefine content creation. Our mission is to make AI the default in advertising without replacing creative people. To achieve this, we need to make sure that our technology isnât just in the hands of big brands â we need to help global enterprises transform how marketing and creative operations work at scale.<br><br>As Director, Customer Success, you will lead one of Pencilâs most strategic enterprise partnerships. You will act as the senior post-sale relationship owner for the account while ensuring the broader account pod operates effectively across customer success, technical implementation, creative production, enablement, and workflow transformation initiatives.<br><br>Youâll also directly manage a Senior Customer Success Manager, helping shape how we scale enterprise customer success at customer engagement frameworks.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Your background:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Extensive experience in Customer Success, Account Management, Professional Services, or Enterprise
